subcommands.name: commands
subcommands.description: list all available JEnv commands

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: parses and displays help contents from a command's source file

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.description: show information about which command will be executed

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: add a JDK to jenv

subcommands.name: enable-plugin
subcommands.description: activate a jEnv plugin

subcommands.name: disable-plugin
subcommands.description: deactivate a jEnv plugin

subcommands.name: doctor
subcommands.description: run jEnv diagnostics

subcommands.name: exec
subcommands.description: run an executable with selected Java version

subcommands.name: global
subcommands.description: sets the global Java version

subcommands.name: global-options
subcommands.description: sets the global Java options

subcommands.name: local
subcommands.description: sets the local application-specific Java version by writing the version name to a file named `.java-version'

subcommands.name: local-options
subcommands.description: sets the local application-specific Java options

subcommands.name: shell
subcommands.description: sets a shell-specific Java version by setting the `JENV_VERSION'

subcommands.name: shell-options
subcommands.description: sets the shell-specific Java options

subcommands.name: hooks
subcommands.description: list hook scripts for a given jenv command

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: configure the shell environment for jenv

subcommands.name: javahome
subcommands.description: display path to selected JAVA_HOME

subcommands.name: macos-javahome
subcommands.description: installs a file located at ~/Library/LaunchAgents/jenv-environment.plist . It sets JAVA_HOME for GUI applications on startup for the **currently active version

subcommands.name: options
subcommands.description: show the current Java options

subcommands.name: options-file
subcommands.description: detect the file that sets the current jenv jvm options

subcommands.name: options-file-read
subcommands.description: read options from file

subcommands.name: options-file-write
subcommands.description: write options to a file

subcommands.name: prefix
subcommands.description: displays the directory where a Java version is installed

subcommands.name: refresh-plugins
subcommands.description: refresh plugins links

subcommands.name: refresh-versions
subcommands.description: refresh alias names

subcommands.name: rehash
subcommands.description: rehash jenv shims (run this after installing executables)

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: remove JDK installations

subcommands.name: root
subcommands.description: display the root directory where versions and shims are kept

subcommands.name: shims
subcommands.description: list existing jenv shims

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: shows the currently selected Java version and how it was selected

subcommands.name: versions
subcommands.description: lists all Java versions found in `$JENV_ROOT/versions/*'

subcommands.name: whence
subcommands.description: list all Java versions that contain the given executable

subcommands.name: which
subcommands.description: display executable path selected by jenv
